'''Jacob Hookem''' (born 4 October 2002) is an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|hk|sh}} or {{rlp|so}} for the [[Dewsbury Rams]] in the [[RFL Championship]].

He has previously played for [[Hull F.C.]] and [[Castleford Tigers]] in the [[Super League]], and at [[Whitehaven R.L.F.C.|Whitehaven]], [[Bradford Bulls]] and [[Midlands Hurricanes]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://dewsburyrams.co.uk/2023/10/24/hookem-signs-for-2024/ |title=Hookem signs for 2024 |website=Dewsbury Rams |date=24 October 2023 |access-date=14 November 2024}}</ref>

==Career==
===Hull FC===
In 13 August 2021 he made his [[Hull F.C.]]  début in the [[Super League]] against the [[Catalans Dragons]].<ref>[https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/58194672 Super League: Catalans Dragons 31-16 Hull FC - Hosts strengthen top spot with win Hull FC v Huddersfield Giants]</ref>

===Dewsbury Rams===
On 25 Oct 2023 it was reported that he had signed for [[Dewsbury Rams]] for 2024.<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=25 Oct 2023|title=Former Castleford Tigers and Hull FC youngster makes Championship move for 2024|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/former-castleford-tigers-and-hull-fc-youngster-jacob-hookem-makes-championship-move-for-2024}}</ref>
